authorization_phrase: Authorize s20-d1 combined-universe weekly relative-strength rotation DRAFT-to-diagnostic bundle (Step 1: DRAFT with pre-SEAL K9 turnover measurement, signal-only, no P&L).

da_register_proposed_byte_equivalent_exc.DA14_DR9_data_continuity: ALL 48 PASS by sealed DR9 results d86e5d1 (s18, result_seal 85667ab3238a27b2) + 574fa9e (s19, 0c8e21f240c8b801); sha-verified at BUILD
da_register_proposed_byte_equivalent_exc.DA15_adjustment_convention: split_only (s18: AAPL/NVDA/AMZN/WMT/GOOGL splits + MRK 1.048 spinoff; s19: NFLX 10:1 + HON 1.061 spinoff; all applied+DR9-verified)
da_register_proposed_byte_equivalent_exc.DA16_data_vendor: tiingo (combined s18+s19 baskets; DR9-sealed d86e5d1 + 574fa9e; NO new fetch)
da_register_proposed_byte_equivalent_exc.DA18_portfolio_position_caps: hold top-M=8 equal-weight; long-only; no shorting/leverage/pyramid; cross-sectional ranking only
da_register_proposed_byte_equivalent_exc.DA21_K13_walk_forward: by-ref 52a3b60; >=3/5 + aggregate net>0 + K9; P6.7 before P10; no per-fold refit
da_register_proposed_byte_equivalent_exc.DA22_K13_fold_scheme: identical bar-index scheme (warmup 0-159; F1 160-478 ... F5 1436-1758) on the shared 1759-bar calendar; pre-committed, UNSEARCHED
da_register_proposed_byte_equivalent_exc.DA2_mechanic_family: F-xmom: cross-sectional relative-strength rotation, long-only, WEEKLY (IDENTICAL to s18/s19)
da_register_proposed_byte_equivalent_exc.DA9_ranking_selection_rule: each WEEKLY rebalance rank 48 by (L-S)=126-21 trailing total return; SELECT top-M
da_register_proposed_byte_equivalent_exc.byte_equivalence_note: ALL strategy params (DA2/DA3/DA5/DA6/DA8/DA9-rank-rule/DA10/DA11/DA12/DA18/DA19/DA20/DA21/DA22) byte-identical to s18/s19. ONLY DA1 (id), DA14/DA16 (combined provenance), DA17 (48-name union) differ.

dr_precedence_chain: DR7 -> DR1 -> DR9 -> DR10 -> DR6 -> DR4 -> DR2 -> DR3 -> DR5
edge_not_inherited: The combined-basket EDGE is NOT assumed or inherited from s18/s19. It is re-proven from scratch at s20 P6 IS (K1 sharpe_proxy>0 AND K2 expectancy>0), P6.7 K13 (>=3/5 + aggregate + K9), and P10 OOS (DR4). A null/negative result is accepted and informative.

preseal_k9_turnover_measurement.method: signal-only rotation count (126-21 rank over 48 names -> top-8 -> count names leaving top-8 as closed trades); NO cash/equity/returns/P&L; reused FROZEN s18/s19 parameterized primitives unmodified; SHA256-verified all 48 CSVs (DR9 integrity); bar-for-bar calendar alignment verified (1759 bars)
preseal_k9_turnover_measurement.note_on_oos_turnover_measurement: OOS TURNOVER is counted signal-only (calendar/ranking-structural) to test OOS K9 reachability up front (the LESSON_S19_D1_003 fix). NO OOS P&L/returns are computed or inspected; the EDGE remains untested until P10. Counting rotations cannot be tuned-to: all params are byte-locked and nothing is changed based on the count (it only gates whether the SAMPLE suffices).

purpose: SAMPLE-SIZE / OOS-K9-reachability-via-breadth test. The s18 weekly RS edge is portable (positive on s18 + s19) but the binding blocker is OOS turnover (s19 K9-terminal at 43.6/y). s20 holds the IDENTICAL byte-locked mechanic (M=8 unchanged) and only broadens the ranking pool to the 48-name union -> more boundary churn -> more OOS turnover. This DRAFT MEASURES whether breadth structurally solves OOS K9 (signal-only, no P&L) BEFORE sealing.

DR10_v2.honest_tension: the breadth that helps OOS-K9 (more turnover) ALSO raises cost_drag; DR10-v2 is the counter-pressure gate, binding at P6.5; a REJECT_FAST is a more live possibility than for the 24-name parents
DR10_v2.turnover_branch: TRUE (weekly rotation; s20 raises it further)

K13_per_fold.note: per-fold sample sufficiency for per-fold-OR-aggregate K9; sign-persistence (>=3/5 positive) re-measured with P&L at P6.7

K9_aggregate_IS.vs_parents: s18=229, s19=226; 48-name union HIGHER (more boundary churn at fixed M=8)

OOS_K9.interpretation: BREADTH STRUCTURALLY SOLVES THE s19 OOS-K9 BLOCKER: the 48-name union clears the >=50/y floor with +17.2/y margin (signal-only). The binding confirmation is still P10 (with P&L).

rec1_equivalent_oos_k9_disclosure: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 >=50/y. Pre-SEAL OOS turnover MEASURED 134 (67.2/y) clears the floor; TRUE OOS K9 (with P&L) confirmed only at P10; the chain shall NOT relax K9.
selection_caveat_section2_CARRIED: The 48-name union INCLUDES the known-OOS-CONFIRMED s18 basket, so a positive s20 IS/OOS is WEAK fresh-generalization evidence (selection bias). s20's honest value is the SAMPLE-SIZE (OOS-K9-reachability) question, NOT independent edge generalization (s19 served that better). Mitigants: union of two PRE-COMMITTED baskets (no cherry-picking); zero param change; M=8 unchanged; edge re-proven at P6 IS; 48-name dilution. Residual concern: MODERATE, disclosed not eliminated. Interpretation rule carried into every downstream phase.
stop_before_seal_rule: If K9 aggregate, OOS K9, OR K13 per-fold sample sufficiency FAILS at this DRAFT measurement -> HALT after DRAFT commit; do NOT SEAL. (All three PASS here -> eligible to SEAL.)
title: s20-d1 combined-universe (s18 union s19, 48-name) weekly RS rotation Tier-N spec DRAFT (carries MEASURED pre-SEAL K9 turnover signal-only no-P&L; reachability ALL PASS; sample-size test; selection caveat carried; edge untested; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE)
